data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the functionality of splitting payments between two cards. While the exploratory step outlines the expectation of confirming the scenario behavior, there is no direct evidence or results from the simulation that validate this requirement. The linked use case mentions group coordination and split payments, but lacks concrete evidence of the actual implementation or testing of the split payment functionality, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence demonstrating the functionality of splitting payments between two cards.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
